arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Cieran Slicker on signing a new deal at Blues
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Cieran Slicker says he feels like he's improved massively in just one year at Ipswich Town - and he wants to continue on that upward trajectory. “Compared to what I was walking into the club last year and where I’m at now, it’s a really big step – I think I’ve improved a lot and my development is on an upward trajectory and I don’t want to stop that.
